com.truelayer.java

Class TrueLayerClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.truelayer.java.TrueLayerClient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITrueLayerClient

    public class TrueLayerClient
extends java.lang.Object
implements ITrueLayerClient
    Main class that holds TrueLayer API client. Should be built with the help of its builder class. Acts as entrypoint for the Java client library capabilities.
    See Also:
    TrueLayerClientBuilder

    • Constructor Summary
